summary: Phase 2 (Admin panel + Reports) backend + frontend E2E testing. 24/24 backend pytest cases pass (admin guard, dashboard, users + status/role toggles, resumes pagination, analytics, ai-usage, HR-scoped reports). Frontend E2E: admin login renders all 5 admin pages (Dashboard, Users, Resumes, Analytics, AI Usage) with stat cards, tables, recharts, pagination, role/status toggle buttons all working with toasts. HR login: sidebar correctly hides admin links, /admin redirects to /dashboard, Reports page renders Time-to-Hire + Stage Funnel + Top Missing Skills + Quota Tracker. No critical issues found.

issues: Dev-mode console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' from recharts ResponsiveContainer during initial layout pass. Charts render correctly after layout settles. Cosmetic only - consider adding minHeight to ResponsiveContainer wrapper to silence the warning.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress recharts 'width(-1)/height(-1)' warnings by giving ResponsiveContainer an explicit minHeight or aspect ratio.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_admin.py: require_admin dependency correctly enforced on all endpoints (verified 403 for HR on all 5 admin endpoints).
routes_admin.py: set_user_status correctly blocks admin self-deactivation with 400.
auth.py: get_current_user returns 403 'Account deactivated' when is_active=0; deactivated user cannot log in (verified by E2E test).
routes_admin.py: _enrich_users() and analytics/ai-usage iterate full collections in-memory; fine for current scale but consider Mongo aggregation pipelines if user/jobs/ai_log volumes exceed 10k.
routes_admin.py: _public() helper defined but never used in dashboard/users responses - the projection {password_hash: 0} already excludes hash, so _public is dead code (minor).
routes_reports.py: _time_to_hire uses one stage_transitions Mongo query per selected candidate (N+1). For current seed data fine; consider batched $in query for scale.
Layout.jsx correctly conditionally renders Admin nav section only when user.role === 'admin' (verified - HR sees no admin links).
AdminRoute guard in App.js correctly redirects non-admin to /dashboard (verified).
All admin pages have comprehensive data-testid coverage (stat cards, user rows, role/status toggles, pagination, search, filters).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin dashboard, user mgmt with toggle+toast, resumes pagination, 4 recharts on analytics, AI usage; HR sidebar hide, /admin redirect, reports page all verified)

test_credentials: HR sarah@hireflow.com / Sarah@1234 ; Admin admin@hireflow.com / Admin@1234
seed_data_creation: Created one throwaway signup user (test_throwaway_*@example.com) for destructive status/role tests; deleted after test run via db cleanup. Demo seeded sarah user role/status was toggled during E2E but reset back to hr/active before logout.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 admin+reports fully passing. Run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_admin_reports.py for regression (24 tests, ~5s). E2E selectors verified: nav-admin-dashboard/users/resumes/analytics/ai, admin-stat-{key}, admin-user-row-{id}, user-row-{id}, status-toggle-{id}, role-toggle-{id}, resume-row-{id}, resumes-prev/next, metric-{label}, ai-summary-{label}, ai-log-{id}, ai-prev/next, stage-funnel, quota-{job}. Phase 1 bulk-stage bug from iteration_1 is fixed (verified by test_upload_pdf_and_lifecycle still passing - endpoint is /candidates/bulk-stage now).
